enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sengarattan Paaraiyula?

The song conveys a lively and joyful vibe, celebrating togetherness and fun.

What is the plot context of the song in Sandakozhi 2?

This song is featured in a celebratory scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere of the movie.

Who are the singers of Sengarattan Paaraiyula?

The song is sung by Ramani Ammal and Senthil Dass.

Who composed the music for Sandakozhi 2?

The music for the movie was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Sengarattan Paaraiyula released?

The song was released on August 21, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sengarattan Paaraiyula, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the celebratory moments in Sandakozhi 2. The lively duet between Ramani Ammal and Senthil Dass brings forth a sense of joy and togetherness, making it perfect for festive occasions. The catchy lyrics by Arivumathi and Yuvan's upbeat music create an atmosphere that resonates with happiness and excitement. This song is a delightful addition to any celebration, evoking feelings of joy and camaraderie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sengarattan Paaraiyula from the movie Sandakozhi 2 is a vibrant and energetic duet that perfectly captures the festive spirit. With the unique collaboration of Ramani Ammal and Senthil Dass, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Yuvan's dynamic composition combined with Arivumathi's catchy lyrics makes it a must-listen for any celebration.
stanzaMeanings: In the red parrot's nest, we are looking at the work that is happening, and we are taking it lightly.
We are looking at it lightly, I am the one taking it lightly, there is nothing good about it, I am the one, I am the one, I am the one.

In the harshness of the land, in the roughness of the path, in the six hundred, there are two different views, inside the heart, it is buzzing, I am the one, the tree of the moonlight is laughing, I am the one, yes, the tree of the moonlight is laughing, I am the one.
In the season, the chicken will peck, the green hen will circle, there is no one to catch it, I will come to you.
There is no one to circle, I am the one, you will come to me, I will give you a kiss, I will give you a kiss, I am the one.
In the running water, in the wild, I will call out loudly, quickly, like a big father, I will let go of my breath and call out to you, can you hear it inside?
I will let go of my breath and call out to you, I am the one, can you hear it inside?
I am the one, can you hear it inside? I am the one.
